forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 19.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly in the early afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the late morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Possible small hail near the eastern border in the evening. Winds northwesterly and light increasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, with possible small hail near the eastern border in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
No Rating
Sun protection 11:10am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, with possible small hail in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, with possible small hail in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Becoming cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the south, high chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the east. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Nullarbor. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 22.
